title: Paul Rowley
description: British RL coach and former England international rugby league footballer
extract:
Paul Rowley (born 12 March 1975) is an English professional rugby league coach who is the head coach of St Helens in the Super League, and former professional rugby league footballer who played in the 1990s and 2000s. 
An England international hooker, he played at club level for Leigh, Halifax and Huddersfield. After retiring as a player, Rowley began a coaching career and was appointed head coach of Leigh in 2012, leading the club to Championship titles in 2014 and 2015 before departing at the beginning of the 2016 season. He subsequently was the head coach of the Toronto Wolfpack in the Championship.
